recommendations.title: How to Steal a Million
recommendations.overview: A woman must steal a statue from a Paris museum to help conceal her father's art forgeries.

recommendations.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
recommendations.overview: It's the hope that sustains the spirit of every GI: the dream of the day when he will finally return home. For three WWII veterans, the day has arrived. But for each man, the dream is about to become a nightmare.

recommendations.title: The Heiress
recommendations.overview: In 1840s New York, the uneventful and boring days of the daughter of a wealthy doctor come to an end when she meets a dashing poorer man — who may or may not be after her inheritance.

recommendations.title: The Collector
recommendations.overview: A man kidnaps a woman and holds her hostage just for the pleasure of having her there.

recommendations.title: The Children's Hour
recommendations.overview: An unruly student at a private all-girls boarding school scandalously accuses the two women who run it of having a romantic relationship.

recommendations.title: The Desperate Hours
recommendations.overview: Escaped convicts terrorize a suburban family they're holding hostage.

recommendations.title: Ben-Hur
recommendations.overview: In ancient Judea, a Jewish aristocrat opposing Roman occupation of his homeland reunites with his childhood friend, now a Roman commander — setting in motion a saga of betrayal, adventure, tragedy, revenge, and faith.

recommendations.title: Funny Girl
recommendations.overview: The life of famed 1930s comedienne Fanny Brice, from her early days in the Jewish slums of New York, to the height of her career with the Ziegfeld Follies, as well as her marriage to the rakish gambler Nick Arnstein.

recommendations.title: The Letter
recommendations.overview: After a woman shoots a man to death, a damning letter she wrote raises suspicions.

recommendations.title: Dodsworth
recommendations.overview: A retired auto manufacturer and his wife take a long-planned European vacation only to find that they want very different things from life.
